events.title: The laugh that surprises everyone
events.text: At exactly the wrong moment, you burst into your first uncontrollable laugh.

choices.label: Laugh even harder
choices.outcome: Your family spends the next hour trying to make you do it again.

choices.label: Try it a different way
choices.outcome: The moment unfolds a little differently, but still becomes part of your story.

events.title: A very important announcement
events.text: You point across the room and attempt a brand-new sentence. Everyone stops to listen.

choices.label: Say it proudly
choices.outcome: The sentence is not perfect, but the meaning is unmistakable.

choices.label: Try it a different way
choices.outcome: The moment unfolds a little differently, but still becomes part of your story.

events.title: The legendary diaper blowout
events.text: During a perfectly ordinary outing, your diaper creates a spectacular laundry emergency.

choices.label: Find the chaos hilarious
choices.outcome: You giggle while a parent performs the fastest emergency change of their life.

choices.label: Cry about the whole disaster
choices.outcome: A parent comforts you, cleans everything up, and promises the day is not ruined.

events.title: Paint everywhere except the paper
events.text: At preschool, your art project escapes the page and reaches your hands, sleeves, and one unfortunate chair.

choices.label: Call it a masterpiece
choices.outcome: You proudly explain that the chair is part of the artwork.

choices.label: Help clean it up
choices.outcome: The teacher calls you a responsible {noun}, even though the chair remains faintly blue.

events.title: A kingdom under the table
events.text: A rainy afternoon turns the living room into an unexplored kingdom of blankets and chairs.

choices.label: Build the grandest fort
choices.outcome: By sunset, your fortress has three rooms and a strict snack policy.

choices.label: Make it a secret reading den
choices.outcome: The rain fades behind pages and torchlight.

events.title: The last swing
events.text: Another child insists the last free swing belongs to them. They look just as determined as you feel.

choices.label: Suggest taking turns
choices.outcome: The compromise works, and neither of you has to summon a grown-up.

choices.label: Find something else to do
choices.outcome: You discover the climbing frame is more fun anyway.

choices.label: Stand your ground
choices.outcome: The argument ends with both of you sent to opposite benches.

events.title: A coin on the pavement
events.text: Something glints near the curb: a coin, muddy but unmistakably real.

choices.label: Put it in your pocket
choices.outcome: Your first tiny windfall feels enormous.

choices.label: Ask nearby adults
choices.outcome: Nobody claims it, but a parent notices your honesty.

choices.label: Add it to a donation jar
choices.outcome: It is not much, yet giving it away feels surprisingly good.

events.title: Thunder after bedtime
events.text: A bright flash fills your room, followed by a crack that rattles the window.

choices.label: Find your family
choices.outcome: Someone makes warm drinks and counts the seconds between flashes with you.

choices.label: Watch from the window
choices.outcome: Fear gives way to awe as the storm rolls across the sky.

events.title: A seed in a paper cup
events.text: You bring home a tiny planted seed and strict instructions to keep it alive.

choices.label: Check it every morning
choices.outcome: A green shoot appears. It feels like a small miracle you helped arrange.

choices.label: Try a sunlight experiment
choices.outcome: Your notes are excellent; the plant is less impressed.

choices.label: Leave it on the windowsill
choices.outcome: The lesson becomes one about remembering responsibilities.

events.title: The flour cloud
events.text: A family recipe is being prepared, and the kitchen needs a very junior assistant.

choices.label: Measure everything carefully
choices.outcome: The result is delicious, apart from one suspiciously salty corner.

choices.label: Volunteer as chief taster
choices.outcome: Your quality-control standards are extremely thorough.

events.title: Room for one more
events.text: Your family is welcoming a new baby. The household suddenly runs on whispers and very little sleep.

choices.label: Become the official helper
choices.outcome: You learn that tiny socks can vanish even before anyone wears them.

choices.label: Keep to your own corner
choices.outcome: You need time to get used to sharing the spotlight.

events.title: Your name on the program
events.text: The class show needs one more person on stage. Every face seems to turn toward you.

choices.label: Step into the spotlight
choices.outcome: Your knees shake, but the applause is real.

choices.label: Help backstage instead
choices.outcome: The props arrive on cue, largely because of you.

choices.label: Politely decline
choices.outcome: Relief wins today, though you wonder what it might have been like.
